title: Thaylian bog-slime

{{Quote|That Thaylian bog-slime. Do you know that I have been here 36 days, slaving to pay a debt in good faith?|Matton Dasol, to Revan on Eli Gand|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Thaylian bog-slime''' was a type of [[Slime/Legends|slime]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> that originated in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Thaylia system/Legends|Thaylia system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Sprizen sector/Legends|Sprizen sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] and [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] [[Matton Dasol]] was familiar with it.<ref name="KOTOR" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="3956 BBY">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] visited<ref name="KOTOR" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. There,<ref name="KOTOR" /> he<ref name="TEA" /> met both Dasol and the Human [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Eli Gand]], who had secretly [[Death/Legends|murdered]] the mechanic's [[Matton Dasol's crew|fellow crewmembers]] and held Dasol as an [[Slavery/Legends|indentured servant]] in order to pay back the debt that the crew supposedly still owed Gand. Eventually, Revan uncovered evidence of Gand's deeds that he presented to the pair. After Dasol subsequently exposed Gand's crime, the mechanic called the trader a Thaylian [[Swamp/Legends|bog]]-slime while complaining to Revan.<ref name="KOTOR" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Thaylian bog-slime was introduced in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. In the game, the bog-slime can be mentioned in an optional conversation the player character, Revan, can have with Matton Dasol. This article assumes one hundred percent game completion and that the conversation took place as described.<ref name="KOTOR" />
